headline: Travel Agency Services Global Market Report 2026: TUI Group, Booking Holdings, and Expedia Group Led the $464.9 Billion Industry in 2025
summary: The travel agency services market is set to grow, driven by rising demand for organized booking and seamless management. Opportunities include adventure and experiential travel, AI/ML-enhanced booking tools, and expanded service reach through acquisitions. North America leads, with growth potential in premium services and expert planning.
